title: DocumentUploaded
description: Emitted by document-service once a document record has been persisted with status PENDING and is ready to be processed.

id.description: Unique identifier of this event message. Consumers use it for idempotency.

version.description: Schema major version. Matches the .vN suffix of this file.

timestamp.description: Event creation time as RFC 3339 / ISO-8601, in UTC.

documentId.description: Identifier of the document this event refers to.

fileName.description: Original file name supplied at upload time.
